name: Courtyard well
description: A small monumental well centered in a paved courtyard: a 3x3 stone rim around a single water-source block, four corner posts rising 3-4 blocks, and a 3x3 pyramid roof of stairs with an apex block. A hanging lantern under the apex lights the water below, turning the well into a pool of light at the heart of the plaza.

required_furniture.rule: Eight `minecraft:cobblestone_wall` (or @secondary in non-medieval styles) forming the 3x3 ring around the centre cell.
A single `minecraft:water` source block at the very centre of the rim, at y0.
Four @primary posts rising 3 blocks (4 when AABB height >= 5) from each rim corner up to the roof plane.
3x3 pyramid roof above the posts: four @stairs blocks on the cardinal edges facing inward, four @roof corner caps, and one @roof apex block in the centre.
One `minecraft:lantern[hanging=true]` hanging from the underside of the roof apex, directly above the water source.
@floor rectangle covering the full AABB at y0; on AABBs larger than 3x3 this becomes the surrounding plaza.

placement_rules: Rim built from `minecraft:cobblestone_wall` in medieval style; falls back to @secondary in other palettes so the rim still reads as masonry.
Pyramid roof: 4 cardinal stairs face inward toward the apex, with @roof corner caps closing the pyramid.
Hanging lantern is placed one block below the apex so light reflects off the water surface.
When the AABB is larger than 3x3, the well stays centred and the surplus is paved with @floor.
lighting_ventilation: The hanging lantern under the apex satisfies the courtyard's night-light budget on Java 1.16.5 and creates the 'Pools of Light' effect over the water; the open sides between the posts provide full cross-ventilation.

medieval.notes: Cobblestone-wall rim, oak-log posts, dark-plank pyramid — the classic village well.

modern.notes: Polished-andesite rim and quartz posts; the rim block falls back to @secondary so the wall reads as stone, not cobble.

fantasy.notes: Mossy-cobblestone rim with a purpur apex — a wishing well in an enchanted plaza.

japanese.notes: Stripped-spruce posts and spruce stairs evoke a temple-courtyard tsukubai.

python_skill_signature: pipeline.skills.courtyard_well.build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
